# pexip_infinity_ivr_theme (Resource)

Manages an IVR theme configuration with the Infinity service.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "pexip_infinity_ivr_theme" "example" {
  name    = "Corporate IVR Theme"
  package = "/path/to/theme.zip"
}
```


<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The unique name of the IVR theme. Maximum length: 250 characters.

### Optional

- `package` (String) Path to the IVR theme package file to upload (e.g., `package = "path/to/theme.zip"`).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource URI for the IVR theme in Infinity
- `resource_id` (Number) The resource integer identifier for the IVR theme in Infinity
- `uuid` (String) UUID for the IVR theme.
